name: prontuario-monorepo
description: Prontuário Eletrônico E2 / SNPE — monorepo (NestJS API + Next.js web)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run start:dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
